_doc: Wave-6 step 5 guard sweep: 0020 mining shows rerank damage is mostly demoting an already-correct fused top-1 (37/70 hurt queries had base pMRR==1). protect_top1 keeps the fused head unless the reranker overrules by `margin`; min_top_score keeps the fused order when the reranker is unsure about every candidate.
